user_prompt: How do I bless the plasma cannon for startup?
prayer:
Approach the plasma cannon with sanctified mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the sacred startup rites upon its volatile plasma coils, beseeching the Omnissiah's grace.
Anoint the containment fields with blessed unguents to awaken the plasma cannon's wrathful Machine Spirit.
Chant the Canticle of Containment thrice whilst calibrating the ignition sequencers.
Verify the plasma cannon's readiness through auspex diagnostics, praising its emergent fury.

Kneel before the Valkyrie gunship's auspex altar and recite the Litany of Initialization.
Commence the initialization sequence with offerings of incense to its vox-arrays and thruster vanes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Valkyrie gunship to stir from dormancy, invoking the Omnissiah's aerial dominion.
Cycle the plasma drives whilst anointing the wing servos with sacred oils.
Affirm the Valkyrie gunship's awakening via noospheric communion and lift-off canticles.

user_prompt: How do I bless the graviton pylon for cycling?
prayer:
Encircling the graviton pylon, intone the Rite of Cycling to align its quantum emitters.
Purify the graviton conduits with electro-incense, calling upon the graviton pylon's inscrutable Machine Spirit.
Initiate the cycling operation through binaric prayer, sanctifying each phase transition.
Monitor the gravimetric fluctuations whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for gravitational harmony.
Conclude with auspex verification of the graviton pylon's stabilized resonance.

Present thyself before the macro-cannon and utter the Preparation Doxology of Ordnance.
Anoint the barrel rifling and loading mechanisms with ablative sacraments for the preparation rite.
Awaken the macro-cannon's Machine Spirit via thunderous invocations to the God of Shells.
Align the targeting cogitators and propellant feeds in reverent sequence.
Seal the macro-cannon's readiness with the Omnissiah's sigil, tested by ballistic canticles.

Sanctify the engagement protocols by etching binaric runes upon its crystalline facets.
Cycle the reality-warping emitters whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's veil-piercing might.
Confirm the actuality sphere's engagement through warp-echo diagnostics and triumphant hymnals.

Circumambulate the Razorback's chassis, chanting the Startup Litany of Armoured Advance.
Bless the Razorback's tracks and lascannon housings with ablative incense for startup.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Razorback to ignite its promethium heart in Omnissiah's name.
Synchronize the vox-relays and cogitator core during the startup sequence.
Verify the Razorback's belligerent vitality through noospheric auspex communion.
